questions.prompt: Какая конструкция используется в предложении: 'Working with limited data, we proposed a solution.'?

choices.text: Working with limited data, we proposed a solution.
Based on the report, the proposal was accepted.
Having analyzed the feedback, the team updated the policy.
To improve efficiency, the process was streamlined.

questions.explanation: V-ing конструкция (Working with limited data) указывает на причину или фон, что соответствует правилу.

questions.prompt: Какая конструкция используется в предложении: 'Based on the report, the decision was made.'?

choices.text: Working with the team, we achieved the goal.
Based on the report, the decision was made.
Having completed the task, the team took a break.
To meet the deadline, the project was accelerated.

questions.explanation: V3 конструкция (Based on the report) используется в пассивном залоге для описания факта.

questions.prompt: Какая конструкция используется в предложении: 'Having reviewed the figures, we made a decision.'?

choices.text: Working with the team, we achieved the goal.
Based on the data, the conclusion was drawn.
Having reviewed the figures, we made a decision.
To improve the product, the team conducted a survey.

questions.explanation: Конструкция having + V3 (Having reviewed) указывает на предшествующее действие.

questions.prompt: Какая конструкция используется в предложении: 'To reduce costs, the company introduced new measures.'?

choices.text: Working with limited data, we proposed a solution.
Based on the report, the proposal was accepted.
Having analyzed the feedback, the policy was updated.
To reduce costs, the company introduced new measures.

questions.explanation: to-infinitive (To reduce costs) используется для выражения цели.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение использует конструкцию V-ing для указания причины?

choices.text: Working with the team, we achieved the goal.
Having completed the task, the team took a break.
Based on the data, the conclusion was drawn.
To meet the deadline, the project was accelerated.

questions.explanation: V-ing конструкция (Working with the team) указывает на причину, что соответствует правилу.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует конструкцию V3 для пассивного описания?

choices.text: Working with the team, we achieved the goal.
Based on the data, the conclusion was drawn.
Having completed the task, the team took a break.
To improve the product, the team conducted a survey.

questions.explanation: V3 конструкция (Based on the data) используется в пассивном залоге для описания факта.
